title: Expense shares
description: One traveler's portion of a split expense — the join the treasurer writes so the settlement view can compute who owes whom. Sum of an expense's shares equals the expense amount.

travelerId.description: the traveler who owes this portion

shareAmount.description: this traveler's owed portion, in the expense's currency

currency.description: ISO currency code matching the parent expense

settled.description: whether this share has been paid back to the payer

settledAt.description: when the share was marked settled

traveler.description: the traveler who owes this share
